validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK). Restore first: dotnet restore. Available targets: net8.0, net9.0, net10.0. net9.0/net8.0 require restore before build.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName

backlog.title: AbortForMaxFailedTestsExtension: LINQ Any with lambda vs Array.IndexOf
backlog.notes: Uses .Any(t => t == ...) with delegate allocation; Array.IndexOf would be more consistent

backlog.title: OfType<FrameworkEngineMetadataProperty>() on IProperty[] arrays
backlog.notes: TestArgumentsManager.IsExpandableTestNode and TestFrameworkEngine use .OfType<struct>().SingleOrDefault() which allocates an enumerator. Manual foreach would avoid enumerator allocation.

backlog.title: BFSTestNodeVisitor.CreatePropertyBagForFilter: new PropertyBag per node
backlog.notes: Called for every node when TreeNodeFilter is active. Creates a new PropertyBag each time. Could cache or reuse.
